Select this box for:  I am submitting Form I-4 07 from inside the United States to document that I abandoned my lawful permanent resident (L P R) status in the past. I have since returned to the United States through a port of entry by being admitted as a nonimmigrant or by being paroled.

label: Part 4. For Government Use Only. 1.
